name: Warren Bus Lines Inc
registry_source: PA Dept of State (file.dos.pa.gov) - no public record retrieved
notes: USDOT 1151962 referenced in third-party trucking aggregators for Warren Bus Lines Inc at 34 Pennsylvania Ave E, Warren, PA but SAFER snapshot returns INACTIVE record with no operational data. Company appears to still be in business per local listings (phone 814-723-8800; Yellow Pages indicates ~48 yrs in business; another source says est. 1991, another says 2002). PA Dept of State business entity record not retrievable via web search; would require direct query at file.dos.pa.gov. Carrier match is by address but FMCSA data unavailable due to inactive status.

name: Ratp Dev USA LLC
fmcsa_address: 300 Throckmorton St Suite 670, Fort Worth, TX 76102
fmcsa_status: active (USDOT); not authorized for-hire interstate operating authority
inc_date: 2009 (per vendor profile); related NY LLC affiliate (RDSL Urban NY LLC) DOS-filed 2013-07-30
entity_status: active (operating); affiliate RDSL Urban NY LLC dissolved 2023-02-16
registry_source: NY Dept of State Division of Corporations (entity per govcb / opengovus.com)
notes: Input lists 'Ratp Dev USA LLC' at 757 3rd Ave, NYC. SAFER snapshot for RATP DEV USA INC (USDOT 1941735) shows current HQ at 300 Throckmorton St, Fort Worth, TX (recent MCS-150 May 2026). NY DOS records show parent uses 295 Madison Ave 29th Fl as historical NY office; 757 3rd Ave is alternate NYC office. Confidence medium because input is 'LLC' while FMCSA carrier is 'INC' - in practice they are linked RATP Group US entities. Address in input does not match SAFER physical address (carrier reports TX HQ).

name: Mat Bus Corp School
notes: FMCSA carrier MAT BUS CORP USDOT 2643668 closely matches input (Philadelphia school bus operator at Orthodox St; PA Entity 4360005 lists 3099 Orthodox St while SAFER lists 3000 Orthodox St - same block, consistent with input '3099 Orthodox St'). Company is part of Total Transportation Corp family providing service to School District of Philadelphia. Last MCS-150 filed 2024-08-28.

name: Palmer Bus Svc Of JWP
notes: Direct address match. PALMER BUS SERVICE OF JWP MINNESOTA INC at 710 E 2nd St, Janesville, MN matches the input record exactly. Subsidiary of broader Palmer Bus Service family (multiple MN affiliates). MCS-150 last filed 2020-03-13 reporting 2019 mileage of 191,975. School/private passenger transport, intrastate only.

name: Hoekstra Transportation
carrier_operation: Interstate, private property and Indian Nation only (not authorized for-hire)
fmcsa_address: 3741 Roger B Chaffee Blvd, Grand Rapids, MI 49548
inc_date: 1928 (business founded; corporate Inc date not confirmed via MI LARA)
officers: Mark Hoekstra & Tom Hoekstra (current owners, since 2012); founded by John F. Hoekstra
registry_source: MI LARA (entity ID not retrieved via web search; would require direct LARA lookup)
notes: Address match exact (3741 Roger B Chaffee Blvd/Memorial Dr SE, Grand Rapids, MI 49548). Note: Hoekstra Transportation Inc is primarily a school bus / commercial bus / van DEALER (sales, service, parts) rather than an operating school bus fleet - low power_units (7) consistent with dealer's own vehicles, not student transport fleet. Recent MCS-150 March 2026. 2024 merger with The Bus Center Family of Companies. Likely NOT a tuck-in operator target - flag for diligence as this is a bus DEALERSHIP, not a transportation operator.
